entries.label: Instructions
entries.default:
-Conduct a Daily Tailgate Safety Meeting with site personel prior to commencing
daily activities. Safety topics can be selected from the attached table.
-Address potential hazards and controls for tasks that will be conducted
-Discuss air monitoring, training, PPE and other appropriate requirments.
-Follow-up on noted items and document the resolution of any action items.

entries.label: Meeting Topics
entries.default:
1. Accident Reporting
2. Air Monitoring
3. Air Monitoring and Action Levels
4. Alcohol Consumption and Worksite Safety
5. Cold Stress
6. Confined Space Entry
7. Crane Safety
8. Daily Work Task Hazards
9. Decontamination
10. Disciplinary Policy for Not Following Safety Rules/Safe Work Practices
11. Drill Rig Safety
12. Electrical Safety
13. Emergency Response
14. Ergonomics
15. Excavation Trenching Hazards
16. Eye Wash Sation Location
17. Fall Protection
18. Fire Safety/Bonding-Grounding Techniques
19. First Aid/CPR
20. Fugitive Dust Control
21.General Site Safety Hazards
22.Hand Tool Hazards
23. Hazard Communication/Location of MSDS/Review of HAZMAT Properties
24. Health and Safety Plan
25. Hearing Protection
26. Heat Stress
27. Heavy Machinery
28. Hospital Directions
29. Housekeeping
30.Material Handling
31.Mechanical Hazards/Guarding/LOTO
32. Overhead Hazards
33. Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)
34.Respiratory Protection and Filter Change-Out Schedule
35. Roles and Responsibilities
36. Site Security
37. Smoking and Break Areas
38. Tank Removal Safety
39. Underground Utilities
40. Use of "Buddy System"
41. Vapor Control
42. Water Hazards
43. Welding Safety
44. Work Stoppage
